CaseResults.ExpectedRecovery: live upperdir is unchanged and staged files are discarded

KillAtStepConcreteCases.Evidence: killed copy-up left an orphan .cow temp; startup cleanup removed it and lower/upper payload stayed unchanged
KillAtStepConcreteCases.ExpectedRecovery: startup cleanup discards orphan .cow temp; lower and upper payload remain unchanged

KillAtStepPlannedCases.ExpectedRecovery: discard temp, lower unchanged, upper remains either old payload or atomically published copy
startup check removes orphan temp files and never exposes a half-published upper
delete intent is either absent or represented by a complete whiteout marker
discard partial extracted payload and leave live upperdir unchanged
source and destination are either pre-fault state or complete post-rename state, never staged partials
discard corrupt accelerator and rebuild from payload tree

Notes: Hardlink ring metadata is treated as a rebuildable cache, not payload truth.
planned-gap entries are intentionally not success evidence.

OOMForcedKillConsistencyCases.ExpectedConsistency: after restart, an operation/container with no live pid is classified as interrupted-or-lmk-suspected and is not shown as Up/running from stale state
OOMForcedKillConsistencyCases.FailureOracle: fail if operation identity, last memory sample, or stale-running suppression is missing
OOMForcedKillConsistencyCases.GapReason: requires Android low-memory or process-control harness to kill/restart the runtime and inspect persisted telemetry

OOMForcedKillConsistencyCases.ExpectedConsistency: daemon death during a COW/overlay mutation leaves only old committed state or a complete published upper entry after startup reconciliation
OOMForcedKillConsistencyCases.FailureOracle: fail if partial temp, whiteout, rename stage, or metadata cache is trusted as Docker-visible success
OOMForcedKillConsistencyCases.GapReason: requires external daemon kill-at-step harness beyond local LD_PRELOAD process injection

OOMForcedKillConsistencyCases.ExpectedConsistency: archive PUT helper death discards staged extraction and preserves live upperdir contents
OOMForcedKillConsistencyCases.FailureOracle: fail if partially extracted files appear in the merged view or if the API reports success without a published stage
OOMForcedKillConsistencyCases.GapReason: requires helper process kill/restart automation around archive PUT publication
